title: GDP Requirements for Couriers & 3PLs
alt: Checklist of GDP requirements for couriers and 3PLs

items.label: Temperature control & qualification
items.desc: Qualified shippers, route risk assessments, ALCOA+ monitoring data

items.label: Security & traceability
items.desc: Driver vetting, sealed loads, track-and-trace, tamper-evidence

items.label: Documentation & handover
items.desc: Proof of delivery, time/temperature data, two-way traceability

items.label: Risk-based qualification & audit
items.desc: Grade by product, route and conditions; audit down the chain

items.label: Technical / quality agreement
items.desc: Define conditions, reporting, notification timelines, right to audit

items.label: Excursion, deviation & recall handling
items.desc: Aligned with ICH Q9 and Q10; RP makes disposition
